name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = i
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator

VARIABLES state, votes, messages

Init == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "None"]
        /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> Participants, type |-> "Prepare"])
          /\ state' = [p \in Participants |-> "Waiting"]
          /\ votes' = votes
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

VoteYes == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Waiting"]
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Participants, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"])
           /\ state' = state
           /\ votes' = [p \in Participants |-> IF p \in Participants THEN "Yes" ELSE votes[p]]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

VoteNo == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Waiting"]
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Participants, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo"])
          /\ state' = state
          /\ votes' = [p \in Participants |-> IF p \in Participants THEN "No" ELSE votes[p]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

Commit == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Waiting"]
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> Participants, type |-> "Commit"])
          /\ state' = [p \in Participants |-> "Committed"]
          /\ votes' = votes
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

Abort == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Waiting"]
         /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> Participants, type |-> "Abort"])
         /\ state' = [p \in Participants |-> "Aborted"]
         /\ votes' = votes
         /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

Next == \/ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forks, philosophers


\* State variables
vars == <<philosophers, forks>>

\* philosophers[i] == state of philosopher i: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
\* forks[i] == owner of fork i: philosopher index or "none"
Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "none"]

\* Helper predicates
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Actions
\* Philosopher i tries to eat
TryEat(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = "none"
            /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = "none"
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<forks>>

\* Philosopher i puts down forks
PutDown(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
             /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = i
             /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i
             /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = "none", ![RightFork(i)] = "none"]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<philosophers>>

\* Philosopher i becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
                  /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<forks>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N : 
          \E action \in {TryEat, PutDown, BecomeHungry} : action(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Type checking
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : philosophers[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 1..N \/ forks[i] = "none"

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Produce by setting 1
                  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                  /\ size' = size + 1
                  /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Consume by setting 0
                  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                  /\ size' = size - 1
                  /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, votes

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* Candidate starts election *)
StartElection == 
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Receive RequestVote RPC *)
ReceiveRequestVote == 
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]
    /\ currentTerm' = MAX(currentTerm, args.term)
    /\ IF args.term = currentTerm THEN
        /\ IF votedFor[s] = NULL \/ votedFor[s] = args.candidateId THEN
            /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = args.candidateId]
            /\ UNCHANGED state

            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
            /\ UNCHANGED state

        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Receive AppendEntries RPC *)
ReceiveAppendEntries == 
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]
    /\ currentTerm' = MAX(currentTerm, args.term)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votedFor, state>>

(* Receive vote *)
ReceiveVote == 
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
    /\ currentTerm' = MAX(currentTerm, args.term)
    /\ IF args.term = currentTerm THEN
        /\ IF args.voteGranted THEN
            /\ votes' = votes + {s}
            /\ IF Cardinality(votes') >= majority THEN
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

                /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

            /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Next == 
    \E s \in 1..N : 
        \E args \in [term \in Nat |-> \E candidateId \in 1..N] : 
            ReceiveRequestVote
        \/ \E args \in [term \in Nat |-> \E leaderId \in 1..N] : 
            ReceiveAppendEntries
        \/ \E args \in [term \in Nat |-> \E voteGranted \in BOOLEAN] : 
            ReceiveVote
        \/ \E args \in [term \in Nat] : 
            StartElection

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, reader

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ reader = readers[r]
        /\ reader \in 1..N
        /\ reader \notin readers
        /\ reader' = reader
        /\ readers' = Append(readers, reader)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ reader = readers[r]
        /\ reader \in 1..N
        /\ reader \in readers
        /\ reader' = reader
        /\ readers' = Remove(readers, reader)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E w \in 1..N :
        /\ writer = w
        /\ writer \in 1..N
        /\ writer \notin readers
        /\ writer \notin writers
        /\ reader' = reader
        /\ readers' = readers
        /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ \E w \in 1..N :
        /\ writer = w
        /\ writer \in 1..N
        /\ writer \in writers
        /\ reader' = reader
        /\ readers' = readers
        /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels
    \* Channels is a set of ordered pairs (i, j) indicating a channel from process i to process j

VARIABLES state, channel, recorded, markerSent
State == [value: Nat]
ChannelState == [buffer: Seq(Message), markerReceived: BOOLEAN]
Message == [msgType: {"DATA", "MARKER"}, data: Nat]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> [value |-> 0]]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> [buffer |-> <<>>, markerReceived |-> FALSE]]
        /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]]

(* Sending a data message from process i to process j *)
SendData(i, j, data) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = Append(channel[(i, j)].buffer, [msgType |-> "DATA", data |-> data])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = Append(channel[(i, j)].buffer, [msgType |-> "MARKER", data |-> 0])]
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i].[(i, j)] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Receiving a data message at process j from process i *)
ReceiveData(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel[(i, j)].buffer = <<[msgType |-> "DATA", data |-> data], rest>>
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = rest]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j].value = state[j].value + data]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded, markerSent>>

(* Receiving a marker at process j from process i *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel[(i, j)].buffer = <<[msgType |-> "MARKER", data |-> 0], rest>
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = rest]
    /\ channel' = [channel' EXCEPT ![(i, j)].markerReceived = TRUE]
    /\ IF NOT recorded[j] THEN
        /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j].value = state[j].value + 1] \* Record local state
        /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent>>

        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent>>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded>>

(* Process i initiates the snapshot *)
InitiateSnapshot(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i].value = state[i].value + 1] \* Record local state
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : (i, j) \in Channels => SendMarker(i, j)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E i, j \in 1..N :
        \/ SendData(i, j, 1) \* Sending data with value 1
        \/ ReceiveData(i, j)
        \/ ReceiveMarker(i, j)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : InitiateSnapshot(i)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Invariant: All processes eventually record their state *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
          /\ channel \in [Channels -> ChannelState]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> [Channels -> BOOLEAN]]
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels
    \* Channels is a set of ordered pairs (i, j) indicating a channel from process i to process j

State == [value: Nat]
ChannelState == [buffer: Seq(Message), markerReceived: BOOLEAN]
Message == [msgType: {"DATA", "MARKER"}, data: Nat]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> [value |-> 0]]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> [buffer |-> <<>>, markerReceived |-> FALSE]]
        /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]]

(* Sending a data message from process i to process j *)
SendData(i, j, data) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = Append(channel[(i, j)].buffer, [msgType |-> "DATA", data |-> data])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = Append(channel[(i, j)].buffer, [msgType |-> "MARKER", data |-> 0])]
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i].[(i, j)] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Receiving a data message at process j from process i *)
ReceiveData(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel[(i, j)].buffer = <<[msgType |-> "DATA", data |-> data], rest>>
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = rest]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j].value = state[j].value + data]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded, markerSent>>

(* Receiving a marker at process j from process i *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel[(i, j)].buffer = <<[msgType |-> "MARKER", data |-> 0], rest>
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = rest]
    /\ channel' = [channel' EXCEPT ![(i, j)].markerReceived = TRUE]
    /\ IF NOT recorded[j] THEN
        /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j].value = state[j].value + 1] \* Record local state
        /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent>>

        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent>>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded>>

(* Process i initiates the snapshot *)
InitiateSnapshot(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i].value = state[i].value + 1] \* Record local state
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : (i, j) \in Channels => SendMarker(i, j)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E i, j \in 1..N :
        \/ SendData(i, j, 1) \* Sending data with value 1
        \/ ReceiveData(i, j)
        \/ ReceiveMarker(i, j)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : InitiateSnapshot(i)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Invariant: All processes eventually record their state *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
          /\ channel \in [Channels -> ChannelState]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> [Channels -> BOOLEAN]]
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels
    \* Channels is a set of ordered pairs (i, j) indicating a channel from process i to process j

State == [value: Nat]
ChannelState == [buffer: Seq(Message), markerReceived: BOOLEAN]
Message == [msgType: {"DATA", "MARKER"}, data: Nat]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> [value |-> 0]]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> [buffer |-> <<>>, markerReceived |-> FALSE]]
        /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]]

(* Sending a data message from process i to process j *)
SendData(i, j, data) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = Append(channel[(i, j)].buffer, [msgType |-> "DATA", data |-> data])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = Append(channel[(i, j)].buffer, [msgType |-> "MARKER", data |-> 0])]
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i].[(i, j)] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Receiving a data message at process j from process i *)
ReceiveData(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N /\ (i, j) \in Channels
    /\ channel[(i, j)].buffer = <<[msgType |-> "DATA", data |-> data], rest>>
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(i, j)].buffer = rest]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j].value = state[j].value + data]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded, markerSent>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES token


vars == <<token>>

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store, action, key, value


vars == <<store, action, key, value>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

Next == 
  \/ /\ action = "Put"
     /\ key \in Keys
     /\ value \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key] = value]
     /\ action' \in {"Put", "Get"}
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ value' \in Values
  \/ /\ action = "Get"
     /\ key \in Keys
     /\ store' = store
     /\ action' \in {"Put", "Get"}
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ value' \in Values

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ IsFiniteSet(Keys)
  /\ IsFiniteSet(Values)
  /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values \/ store[k] = NULL

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue, promisedBallot, v

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = NULL

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].promisedBallot <= b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].promisedBallot' = b
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] ]

Promise(p, b, v, v') == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenBallot <= b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenBallot' = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenValue' = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] ]

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenBallot <= b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenBallot' = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenValue' = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] ]

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenBallot <= b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenBallot' = b
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].chosenValue' = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] ]

Choose(p, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = 1
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = v
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN proposers[i] ELSE proposers[i] ]

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ chosen = NULL
  /\ chosen' = v
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M: 
    /\ \E b \in 1..N: 
      /\ Prepare(p, b)
      /\ \E v \in V: 
        /\ Promise(p, b, v, NULL)
        /\ Accept(p, b, v)
        /\ Accepted(p, b, v)
        /\ Choose(p, v)
        /\ Chosen(v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M: 
    /\ \E b \in 1..N: 
      /\ Prepare(p, b)
      /\ \E v \in V: 
        /\ \E v' \in V: 
          /\ Promise(p, b, v, v')
          /\ Accept(p, b, v')
          /\ Accepted(p, b, v')
          /\ Choose(p, v')
          /\ Chosen(v')
  \/ \E p \in 1..M: 
    /\ \E b \in 1..N: 
      /\ Prepare(p, b)
      /\ \E v \in V: 
        /\ \E v' \in V: 
          /\ Promise(p, b, v, v')
          /\ \E v'' \in V: 
            /\ Accept(p, b, v'')
            /\ Accepted(p, b, v'')
            /\ Choose(p, v'')
            /\ Chosen(v'')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in V \cup {NULL}

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT
VARIABLES chunkIndex, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state


\* Helper predicates
IsValidChunkIndex(i) == i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT
IsValidRetransmitCount(c) == c \in 0..MAX_RETRIES

\* Initial state: idle, no chunks sent or received
Init == /\ state = "idle"
        /\ chunkIndex = 1
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = {}
        /\ receivedChunks = {}

\* Action: send the next chunk
SendChunk == /\ state = "idle"
             /\ IsValidChunkIndex(chunkIndex)
             /\ state' = "sending"
             /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunkIndex}
             /\ retransmitCount' = 0
             /\ UNCHANGED <<chunkIndex, receivedChunks>>

\* Action: acknowledge receipt of a chunk (non-deterministic)
AcknowledgeChunk == /\ state = "sending"
                   /\ IsValidChunkIndex(chunkIndex)
                   /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks \cup {chunkIndex}
                   /\ state' = "waiting"
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

\* Action: timeout waiting for acknowledgment
Timeout == /\ state = "waiting"
           /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
           /\ state' = IF retransmitCount' > MAX_RETRIES
                       THEN "error"

           /\ UNCHANGED <<chunkIndex, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

\* Action: proceed to next chunk after successful acknowledgment
Proceed == /\ state = "waiting"
           /\ IsValidChunkIndex(chunkIndex)
           /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
           /\ state' = IF chunkIndex' > CHUNK_COUNT
                       THEN "done"

           /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

\* Action: reset to initial state after completion or error
Reset == /\ state \in {"done", "error"}
         /\ state' = "idle"
         /\ chunkIndex' = 1
         /\ retransmitCount' = 0
         /\ sentChunks' = {}
         /\ receivedChunks' = {}
         /\ UNCHANGED <<chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

\* Next-state relation
Next == SendChunk \/ AcknowledgeChunk \/ Timeout \/ Proceed \/ Reset

\* Invariant: all sent chunks are eventually acknowledged
TypeOK == /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting", "done", "error"}
          /\ chunkIndex \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
          /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ receivedChunks \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ sentChunks \subseteq receivedChunks

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId

(* db: mapping from key to value *)
(* txns: mapping from transaction id to transaction state *)
(* nextTxId: next transaction id to assign *)

(* Transaction states *)
TxState == [id: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"},
            readSet: [key \in Keys(db) -> Nat],
            writeSet: [key \in Keys(db) -> Nat]]

(* Initialize the database and transaction manager *)
Init == /\ db = [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0]
        /\ txns = [ ]
        /\ nextTxId = 1

(* Begin a new transaction *)
BeginTx == 
  LET txId == nextTxId
  IN /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
     /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [id |-> txId,
                                          status |-> "active",
                                          readSet |-> [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0],
                                          writeSet |-> [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0]]]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Read a key within a transaction *)
Read(k) == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].readSet[k] = db[k]]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Write a key within a transaction *)
Write(k, v) == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].writeSet[k] = v]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Commit a transaction *)
Commit == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
      readSet == txns[txId].readSet
      writeSet == txns[txId].writeSet
      conflict == \E k \in Keys(db) : writeSet[k] # 0 /\ db[k] # readSet[k]
  IN /\ conflict => /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "aborted"]
                    /\ UNCHANGED db
     /\ \A k \in Keys(db) : writeSet[k] = 0 => /\ txns' = txns
                                               /\ UNCHANGED db
     /\ \A k \in Keys(db) : writeSet[k] # 0 => /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "committed"]
                                               /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = writeSet[k]]
                                               /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId

(* Abort a transaction *)
Abort == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "aborted"]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == BeginTx \/ Read(k) \/ Write(k, v) \/ Commit \/ Abort

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId>>

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys(db) -> Nat]
          /\ txns \in [Keys(txns) -> TxState]
          /\ nextTxId \in Nat

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + Random(-1, 1)]
          /\ clocks' = [j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j] + offsets[j] + offsets'[j]]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = i
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![j] = FALSE \E j \in 0..N-1 \ /\ j # i]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [0..N-1 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 0..N-1

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, updates
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N: \E j \in 1..N: i # j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup known[j] ELSE known[k]]
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup infected[j] ELSE infected[k]]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: \E u \in updates: u \notin infected[i]
          /\ known' = known
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup {u} ELSE infected[k]]


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N: known[i] \subseteq updates
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: infected[i] \subseteq updates

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
       /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
       /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c])
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cap allocated[c]) = {}
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c]) = {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(allocated[c]) = Cardinality(allocated[c])

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Subscribers, Topics

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* State variables:
   - subscribers: mapping from topic to set of subscriber IDs
   - messages: mapping from topic to sequence of messages *)

Init ==
  subscribers = [t \in Topics |-> {}] /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]

Next ==
  \E t \in Topics : \E s \in Subscribers :
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}]
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], "msg")]

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == 
  /\ turn = 0
  /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  /\ turn' = turn
  /\ wants' = wants
  /\ \/ /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ turn \in 0..1
  /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


vars == <<counts>>

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
          /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat
